## Validation

- [ ] Focused build/test executed
- [ ] Tier 1 checks pass
- [ ] Secret scan passes
- [ ] `git diff --check` passes

## Boundaries

- [ ] No unintended browser/CDP/live-runtime activation
- [ ] No public/product or production authority opened
- [ ] No secrets, customer data or raw credentials added
- [ ] No release/commercial claim without explicit authorization
